title: Churn at private banks' finance function, 2 CFOs quit
ପ୍ରେମ ବିବାହକୁ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର କରି ଆକ୍ରମଣ: ବନ୍ଧା ହେଲେ ୭ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ
description:
ଥୁଆମୂଳ ରାମପୁର,୨୯ା୬(ଦୁର୍ଗା କୀର୍ତ୍ତି): ଥୁଆମୂଳ ରାମପୁର ଥାନା ତାରାଗାଁଠାରେ ଏକ ଦଳିତ ପରିବାର ଉପରେ ହୋଇଥିବା ଆକ୍ରମଣ ଘଟଣାରେ ପୋଲିସ ସୋମବାର ୭ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତଙ୍କୁ ଗିରଫ କରି କୋର୍ଟ ଚାଲାଣ କରିଛି। ସେମାନେ ହେଲେ ନବୀନ ମାଝୀ (୪୦), ସନ୍ତୋଷ ମାଝୀ (୨୫), ଦୟା ସାଗର ଗୌଡ଼ (୨୨), ସାନୁର୍ଜୟ ମାଝୀ (୩୨), ସୁବାସ ଗୌଡ଼ (୪୦), ସାରଥୀ ମାଝୀ (୨୭) ଓ ଡେଙ୍ଗା ମାଝୀ (୫୦)। ମିଳିଥିବା ସୂଚନା ଅନୁସାରେ, ଗତ ମେ ୩୦ ତାରିଖରେ […]
The post ପ୍ରେମ ବିବାହକୁ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର କରି ଆକ୍ରମଣ: ବନ୍ଧା ହେଲେ ୭ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଥୁଆମୂଳ ରାମପୁର,୨୯ା୬(ଦୁର୍ଗା କୀର୍ତ୍ତି): ଥୁଆମୂଳ ରାମପୁର ଥାନା ତାରାଗାଁଠାରେ ଏକ ଦଳିତ ପରିବାର ଉପରେ ହୋଇଥିବା ଆକ୍ରମଣ ଘଟଣାରେ ପୋଲିସ ସୋମବାର ୭ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତଙ୍କୁ ଗିରଫ କରି କୋର୍ଟ ଚାଲାଣ କରିଛି। ସେମାନେ ହେଲେ ନବୀନ ମାଝୀ (୪୦), ସନ୍ତୋଷ ମାଝୀ (୨୫), ଦୟା ସାଗର ଗୌଡ଼ (୨୨), ସାନୁର୍ଜୟ ମାଝୀ (୩୨), ସୁବାସ ଗୌଡ଼ (୪୦), ସାରଥୀ ମାଝୀ (୨୭) ଓ ଡେଙ୍ଗା ମାଝୀ (୫୦)।
ମିଳିଥିବା ସୂଚନା ଅନୁସାରେ, ଗତ ମେ ୩୦ ତାରିଖରେ ଏସ୍‌ସି ପୁଅ ଓ ଏସ୍‌ଟି ଝିଅଙ୍କ ପ୍ରେମ ବିବାହ ବିବାଦକୁ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର କରି ଗ୍ରାମର ଶତାଧିକ ଓବିସି ଓ ଏସ୍‌ଟି ସମ୍ପ୍ରଦାୟର ଲୋକେ କବାଟ ଭାଙ୍ଗି ଏକ ଏସ୍‌ସି ପରିବାର ଉପରେ ଆକ୍ରମଣ କରିଥିଲେ। ଏଥିରେ ଅଜୟ ନାଏକ, ହଲଧର ନାଏକ ଓ ରତ୍ନାବତୀ ନାଏକ ଗୁରୁତର ହୋଇ ହସ୍ପିଟାଲରେ ଚିକିତ୍ସିତ ହେଉଥିଲେ।
ଏହି ହିଂସାକାଣ୍ଡ ପରେ ଜୀବନ ଭୟରେ ଗ୍ରାମର ୮ଟି ଦଳିତ ପରିବାର ଭିଟାମାଟି ଛାଡ଼ି ଅନ୍ୟତ୍ର ପଳାଇଛନ୍ତି। ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତଙ୍କୁ ଗିରଫ କରିବାରେ ପୋଲିସର ଶିଥିଳତା ପ୍ରତିବାଦରେ ଅଲ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ସିଡ୍ୟୁଲ୍ଡ କାଷ୍ଟ ଫେଡରେଶନ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଏସପିଙ୍କ ଅନୁପସ୍ଥିତିରେ ଡିଏସପି ହରିବନ୍ଧୁ ଭତ୍ରାଙ୍କୁ ଭେଟି ତୁରନ୍ତ ନ୍ୟାୟ ପ୍ରଦାନ ସହ ଥାନା ଘେରାଉ ଚେତାବନୀ ଦେଇଥିଲେ। ଏ ନେଇ ଥାନା ଅଧିକାରୀ କୈବଲ୍ୟ ସେଠ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ସମ୍ବେଦନଶୀଳ ମାମଲା ହୋଇଥିବାରୁ ସବୁ ଦିଗରୁ ତଦନ୍ତ ପାଇଁ ସାମାନ୍ୟ ବିଳମ୍ବ ହୋଇଛି। ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ସୁଦ୍ଧା ମାମଲା ନମ୍ବର ୯୧/୨୬ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ ୭ ଜଣଙ୍କୁ ଗିରଫ କରାଯାଇଛି। ଅନ୍ୟ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତମାନଙ୍କୁ ମଧ୍ୟ ଗିରଫ କରାଯିବ ବୋଲି କହିଛନ୍ତି।
The post ପ୍ରେମ ବିବାହକୁ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର କରି ଆକ୍ରମଣ: ବନ୍ଧା ହେଲେ ୭ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: भोपाल में जीतू पटवारी का महा-ऐलान; हर पंचायत में तैनात होंगे 5 ‘किसान न्याय योद्धा’
description: Congress Kisan Nyay Yodha: भोपाल में किसान कांग्रेस की बैठक, हर पंचायत में नियुक्त होंगे 5 'किसान न्याय योद्धा'; जीतू पटवारी ने पदाधिकारियों को दी शत-प्रतिशत जवाबदेही की चेतावनी।
content:
Jitu Patwari Big Announcement: मध्य प्रदेश किसान कांग्रेस की महत्वपूर्ण प्रदेश कार्यकारिणी बैठक सोमवार को भोपाल स्थित प्रदेश कांग्रेस कार्यालय इंदिरा भवन में आयोजित की गई। बैठक की अध्यक्षता किसान कांग्रेस के प्रदेश अध्यक्ष धर्मेंद्र सिंह चौहान ने की, जबकि मुख्य अतिथि के रूप में मध्य प्रदेश कांग्रेस कमेटी के प्रदेश अध्यक्ष जीतू पटवारी मौजूद रहे।
बैठक में संगठन को अधिक मजबूत, सक्रिय और गांव-गांव तक विस्तार देने को लेकर कई महत्वपूर्ण निर्णय लिए गए। इस दौरान किसान कांग्रेस की नई प्रदेश कार्यकारिणी की भी घोषणा की गई।
हर पंचायत में नियुक्त होंगे पांच किसान न्याय योद्धा
बैठक का सबसे अहम निर्णय किसान न्याय योद्धा अभियान की शुरुआत रहा। अभियान के तहत प्रदेश की प्रत्येक पंचायत और गांव में पांच-पांच किसान न्याय योद्धा नियुक्त किए जाएंगे। इनकी जिम्मेदारी किसानों की समस्याओं को संगठन और प्रशासन तक पहुंचाना, किसान हितों की रक्षा करना तथा गांव स्तर पर संगठन को मजबूत बनाना होगी। कांग्रेस का मानना है कि इस पहल से किसानों की समस्याओं का समाधान जमीनी स्तर पर अधिक प्रभावी तरीके से हो सकेगा और संगठन की पहुंच ग्रामीण क्षेत्रों तक और मजबूत होगी।
सोशल मीडिया के जरिए गांव-गांव तक पहुंचेगी किसानों की आवाज
बैठक में किसान कांग्रेस की गतिविधियों और किसान हितों से जुड़े मुद्दों को सोशल मीडिया के माध्यम से व्यापक स्तर पर प्रसारित करने की रणनीति पर भी विस्तार से चर्चा की गई। नेताओं ने कहा कि डिजिटल माध्यमों का प्रभावी उपयोग कर किसानों की आवाज प्रदेश के हर गांव तक पहुंचाई जाएगी। साथ ही संगठन के कार्यों और आंदोलनों की जानकारी भी सोशल मीडिया प्लेटफॉर्म के जरिए अधिक लोगों तक पहुंचाने पर जोर दिया गया।
&#8216;जवाबदेही और संगठन विस्तार सबसे बड़ी प्राथमिकता&#8217;
बैठक को संबोधित करते हुए प्रदेश कांग्रेस अध्यक्ष जीतू पटवारी ने कहा कि यह माह संगठन को शत-प्रतिशत पूर्ण करने का है। उन्होंने सभी जिला और ब्लॉक स्तर के पदाधिकारियों से प्रत्येक गांव में किसान न्याय योद्धा तैयार करने और संगठन का विस्तार करने का आह्वान किया।
यह भी पढ़ें: इंदौर हनीमून मर्डर केस में बड़ा मोड़! सोनम रघुवंशी की जमानत हाईकोर्ट ने रखी बरकरार; बिलख पड़ी राजा की मां
जीतू पटवारी ने कहा कि संगठन में जवाबदेही सर्वोपरि होगी और पदाधिकारियों के कार्यों की नियमित समीक्षा की जाएगी। प्रदर्शन के आधार पर आवश्यक संगठनात्मक निर्णय लिए जाएंगे। उन्होंने कहा कि मजबूत संगठन और जमीनी स्तर पर सक्रिय कार्यकर्ताओं के माध्यम से ही किसानों के अधिकारों की प्रभावी लड़ाई लड़ी जा सकती है।

title: IRDAI’s proposed insurance distribution reforms EXPLAINED; What could change for insurers and policyholders? | EXCLUSIVE
description: IRDAI has indicated major insurance distribution reforms are under consideration. The upcoming discussion paper may address commissions, bancassurance, corporate agents and customer protection, potentially reshaping India's insurance industry landscape.
content: India’s insurance sector could be heading for significant regulatory changes, with the Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India (IRDAI) indicating that a discussion paper on insurance distribution reforms will be released in the coming months.Speaking exclusively to ET Now, IRDAI Member Swaminathan S. Iyer said the regulator is working on proposals that could reshape the way insurance products are distributed across the country. However, he stressed that policyholder protection will remain at the core of any future reforms.Why Are Reforms Being Considered?According to Iyer, the insurance industry itself has sought greater clarity and structure in the distribution ecosystem. The proposed changes are expected to address issues related to commissions, bancassurance partnerships, corporate agents and the broader distribution framework.The move also comes amid evolving regulatory expectations. Iyer pointed out that recent directions from the banking regulator and provisions under existing legislation require the insurance regulator to frame rules governing commissions and distribution practices.No Push for a ‘One Insurer’ ModelAddressing concerns around distribution partnerships, Iyer made it clear that IRDAI does not support a rigid “one company, one insurer” approach.He noted that the current regulatory framework already allows open architecture for banks and corporate agents. While some institutions have chosen to work with multiple insurers, others have preferred exclusive arrangements. According to the regulator, such business decisions should be left to market participants rather than being dictated by regulation.IRDAI’s role, he said, is to facilitate orderly growth of the insurance sector without interfering in how companies choose to conduct their business.Discussion Paper Coming FirstWhile confirming that a discussion paper is on the way, Iyer refrained from providing a timeline for final regulations.He said the regulator will first seek feedback from insurers, intermediaries and the public before deciding the next course of action. Given the wide-ranging impact of any changes, IRDAI intends to proceed cautiously and evaluate stakeholder responses carefully.This means that while reforms are being actively worked on, the final framework will depend significantly on the consultation process.Policyholder Protection Remains the PriorityA key focus area for the regulator is ensuring that distribution practices align with customer interests.Iyer indicated that factors such as policy persistency, product complexity, customer profile and policy tenure could play a role in shaping future regulatory thinking. Some insurers have already started linking distributor incentives to persistency metrics, encouraging better customer retention and service quality.At the same time, he clarified that IRDAI is unlikely to adopt an overly prescriptive approach. Instead, the regulator aims to create a framework that balances market flexibility with consumer protection.What It Means for the IndustryIf implemented, the proposed reforms could have far-reaching implications for insurers, banks, corporate agents and insurance distributors. Changes in commission structures, distribution models and customer-centric measures may alter the competitive landscape of the sector.For now, all eyes are on the upcoming discussion paper, which is expected to provide the first detailed look at IRDAI’s plans for the future of insurance distribution in India.

title: स्पीति वैली में बस की छत पर बैठकर सफर करते दिखे पर्यटक, 200 मीटर गहरी खाई के बीच वायरल वीडियो पर मचा बवाल
description: Spiti Valley Viral Video : स्पीति वैली में बस की छत पर बैठकर सफर कर रहे पर्यटकों का वीडियो सोशल मीडिया पर तेजी से वायरल हो रहा है। लोग टूर ऑपरेटर पर कार्रवाई की मांग कर रहे हैं।
content:
Bus Roof Viral Video : हिमाचल प्रदेश की खूबसूरत स्पीति वैली अपनी बर्फीली चोटियों, बौद्ध मठों और मनमोहक प्राकृतिक नजारों के लिए दुनियाभर में मशहूर है। लेकिन इन दिनों यहां का एक वीडियो सोशल मीडिया पर अलग वजह से चर्चा में है।
वायरल वीडियो में करीब 10 पर्यटक एक चलती बस की छत पर बैठकर पहाड़ी रास्तों का आनंद लेते दिखाई दे रहे हैं। बताया जा रहा है कि सड़क के किनारे करीब 200 मीटर गहरी खाई है, जिसके नीचे सतलुज नदी बहती है। ऐसे में वीडियो देखकर कई लोग इसे बेहद खतरनाक बता रहे हैं।

Best thing about this point is that the gorge here is almost 200 m plus and chilled ice cold satluj down there ! More specifically, rescue operations are going to be more tough seeing the terrain! I pity only the admin who have to make the effort to save these chimps who feel… pic.twitter.com/kFDRDJdoww
— Nikhil saini (@iNikhilsaini) June 28, 2026

बस की छत पर बैठकर सफर करते दिखे पर्यटक
यह वीडियो सोशल मीडिया प्लेटफॉर्म X पर निखिल सैनी नाम के यूजर ने शेयर किया है। पोस्ट के साथ लिखा गया कि यहां रेस्क्यू ऑपरेशन बेहद मुश्किल होते हैं, लेकिन कुछ लोग बस की छत पर बैठकर सफर करना &#8220;कूल&#8221; समझ रहे हैं।
वीडियो में दिखाई दे रही बस को कुछ यूजर्स ने बलवंत ऑपरेटर्स की बस बताया है। हालांकि, वीडियो कब का है और इसमें दिख रहे लोगों की पहचान या घटना की आधिकारिक पुष्टि नहीं हुई है। इसलिए वीडियो से जुड़े दावों की स्वतंत्र पुष्टि नहीं की जा सकती।
ये खबर भी पढ़ें : फ्लाइट में एयर होस्टेस बनी पत्नी को देख पति रह गया हैरान, खूबसूरत सरप्राइज वीडियो जीत रहा लोगों का दिल
यूजर्स ने टूर ऑपरेटर के खिलाफ कार्रवाई की मांग की
वीडियो वायरल होने के बाद सोशल मीडिया पर लोगों ने कड़ी प्रतिक्रिया दी है। कई यूजर्स ने टूर ऑपरेटर के खिलाफ कार्रवाई की मांग करते हुए कहा कि यात्रियों को इस तरह बस की छत पर बैठने की अनुमति देना गंभीर लापरवाही हो सकती है।
एक यूजर ने मजाकिया अंदाज में लिखा, &#8220;एक जोर का ब्रेक लगा तो सीधा बंजी जंप हो जाएगा।&#8221; वहीं दूसरे ने इसे नियमों के खिलाफ बताते हुए सख्त कार्रवाई की मांग की। सोशल मीडिया पर कई लोगों ने पहाड़ी इलाकों में यात्रा के दौरान सुरक्षा नियमों का पालन करने की जरूरत पर भी जोर दिया।

title: Supreme Court protects the Federal Reserve, but what about everybody else?
description: While the central bank’s independence was upheld, other agencies were not so lucky

title: क्या आपकी हड्डियां अंदर ही अंदर खोखली हो रही हैं? डॉक्टर ने बताए 5 फूड्स जो पूरी कर सकते हैं कैल्शियम की कमी
description: Calcium Deficiency Foods:अगर आपकी हड्डियां कमजोर हो रही हैं, तो यह कैल्शियम की कमी का संकेत हो सकता है। जानिए डॉक्टर द्वारा बताए गए 5 ऐसे फूड्स, जो प्राकृतिक रूप से कैल्शियम की कमी पूरी कर सकते हैं।
content:
Signs Of Calcium Deficiency In Adults :लगातार थकान, मांसपेशियों में खिंचाव, दांतों का कमजोर होना या बार-बार हड्डियों में दर्द&#8230; लोग अक्सर इन संकेतों को सामान्य समझकर नजरअंदाज कर देते हैं। लेकिन हेल्थ एक्सपर्ट्स के अनुसार, ये शरीर में कैल्शियम की कमी के शुरुआती संकेत भी हो सकते हैं।
अगर समय रहते इस कमी को पूरा न किया जाए, तो आगे चलकर हड्डियों से जुड़ी गंभीर समस्याएं हो सकती हैं। आइए जानते हैं कि किन 5 चीजों को डाइट में शामिल करके कैल्शियम की जरूरत काफी हद तक पूरी की जा सकती है।
आखिर एक दिन में शरीर को कितना कैल्शियम चाहिए? जवाब जानकर चौंक जाएंगे
डॉ. शालिनी सिंह सालुंखे के अनुसार, 19 से 50 वर्ष की उम्र के लोगों को प्रतिदिन लगभग 1000 मिलीग्राम कैल्शियम की आवश्यकता होती है। वहीं 50 वर्ष से अधिक उम्र की महिलाओं और बुजुर्ग पुरुषों के लिए यह मात्रा बढ़कर 1200 मिलीग्राम प्रतिदिन हो जाती है।
पहला सुपरफूड&#8230; जिसे लोग मोटे अनाज समझकर नजरअंदाज कर देते हैं
रागी: कैल्शियम का बेहतरीन प्राकृतिक स्रोत मानी जाती है। यदि आप रोज दो मीडियम साइज़ रागी की रोटियां खाते हैं, तो लगभग 200 से 250 मिलीग्राम कैल्शियम मिल सकता है।
रोज सिर्फ 2 चम्मच&#8230; और कैल्शियम की अच्छी-खासी पूर्ति
भुना हुआ तिल: दिन में दो चम्मच भुने हुए तिल का सेवन करने से करीब 180 से 200 मिलीग्राम कैल्शियम मिल सकता है। इसलिए इसे कैल्शियम का एक आसान और असरदार स्रोत माना जाता है।
यह हरी चीज जितनी साधारण दिखती है, उतनी ही ताकतवर मानी जाती है
हरी पत्तेदार सब्जियां:
रोजाना एक कटोरी हरी पत्तेदार सब्जियां खाने से लगभग 200 मिलीग्राम कैल्शियम प्राप्त किया जा सकता है। साथ ही ये शरीर को कई अन्य जरूरी पोषक तत्व भी देती हैं।
ये भी पढ़ें-Sweet Eating Time: मीठा खाने का सही समय जानिए, नहीं तो बढ़ सकती है शुगर और मोटापे की समस्या
मुट्ठीभर यह ड्राई फ्रूट भी कर सकता है बड़ा काम
बादाम: रोज 8 से 10 बादाम खाने से लगभग 80 से 100 मिलीग्राम कैल्शियम मिल सकता है। इसके अलावा बादाम शरीर को हेल्दी फैट, प्रोटीन और कई जरूरी मिनरल्स भी प्रदान करता है।
इस देसी फूड को डाइट में शामिल करते ही बढ़ने लगती है कैल्शियम की मात्रा
छोले: एक कटोरी उबले हुए छोले खाने से करीब 80 से 100 मिलीग्राम कैल्शियम मिल सकता है। यदि इन सभी खाद्य पदार्थों को संतुलित मात्रा में डाइट में शामिल किया जाए, तो लगभग 800 मिलीग्राम तक कैल्शियम प्राप्त किया जा सकता है। बाकी की जरूरत सामान्य भोजन से पूरी हो जाती है।
लेकिन एक कमी रह गई&#8230; तो कैल्शियम भी नहीं आएगा किसी काम
डॉ. शालिनी सिंह सालुंखे का कहना है कि यदि शरीर में विटामिन D की कमी है, तो कैल्शियम का अवशोषण ठीक तरह से नहीं हो पाता। इसलिए केवल कैल्शियम युक्त भोजन खाना ही पर्याप्त नहीं है, बल्कि शरीर में विटामिन D का स्तर भी संतुलित होना बेहद जरूरी है। तभी हड्डियां वास्तव में मजबूत बन पाती हैं।

title: কাছাৰত জব্দ ৩ কোটি টকা মূল্যৰ নিচাজাতীয় সামগ্ৰীঃ ১টা সৰবৰাহকাৰীক গ্ৰেপ্তাৰ
description:
ডিজিটেল সংবাদ, শিলচৰঃ কাছাৰত পুনৰ‌‌ নিচাজাতীয় সামগ্ৰী জব্দ কৰা হৈছে।‌ উপ আৰক্ষী অধীক্ষক ভাস্কৰ শিখা শইকীয়াৰ নেতৃত্বত ধলাই থানাৰ আৰক্ষীয়ে কুলিছৰা বজাৰত অভিযান চলাই এখন ফাৰ্ণিছাৰৰ দোকানৰ পৰা জব্দ কৰে বুজন পৰিমাণৰ নিচাজাতীয় য়াবা টেবলেট।
ফাৰ্নিচাৰ দোকানখনৰ এটা আলমাৰীত লুকুৱাই ৰখা অৱস্থাত জব্দ কৰা হয় ১০হাজাৰ য়াবা টেবলেট। জব্দ কৰা টেবলেট খিনিৰ ওজন ১.০৬৪ কেজি। জব্দকৃত টেবলেট খিনিৰ মুল্য ৩ কোটি টকা বুলি সদৰী কৰিছে আৰক্ষীয়ে।
ইফালে, টেবলেটৰ‌ সৈতে এটা iPhone জব্দ কৰাৰ লগতে নিচাজাতীয় সামগ্ৰী মজুত কৰি ৰখাৰ অভিযোগত আৰক্ষীয়ে এজন লোকক গ্ৰেপ্তাৰ কৰিছে। ধৃত ব্যক্তি জন কুলিছৰা চুভাছিনি গাৱৰ জুবেল আহমেদ লস্কৰ। এই‌ সংক্ৰান্তত ধলাই থানাত‌ গোচৰ ৰুজু কৰি‌ আৰক্ষীয়ে তদন্ত অব্যাহত ৰাখিছে।

ET Now Exclusive: Can banking stocks power next Nifty rally? Experts decode HDFC Bank, Kotak and BFSI outlook | WATCH
description: Banking stocks remain in focus as ET Now experts see improving BFSI fundamentals, easing liquidity pressures and falling bond yields supporting the sector, while sharing views on IT, NBFCs and stock-specific trading ideas.
content: Banking stocks have returned to the spotlight, with HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank and Axis Bank witnessing renewed buying interest as analysts highlight improving fundamentals across the BFSI space.https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CfBn6zhyCmk&t=411sIn an exclusive interaction with ET Now, market experts Kunal Bothra and Pankaj Pande discussed the outlook for HDFC Bank, the leadership transition at Kotak Mahindra Bank, prospects for private sector lenders, and the impact of easing bond yields and improving liquidity on the banking sector. They also shared their views on the IT, power and pharma sectors, stock-specific trading ideas, and key support and resistance levels for the Nifty and Bank Nifty.Key insights on bankingKunal Bothra is bullish on private banks (e.g., HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Axis Bank). HDFC Bank is noted for forming a base and showing stability. He said banking is expected to lead the Nifty rally, supported by falling bond yields and improved liquidity. Kotak Bank faces near-term performance challenges due to leadership uncertainty.Bothra said, "I think what's happened over the last few days is significant. I was looking at the relative strength scale, and private sector banking stocks have moved into the top three or four sectors in terms of performance. This suggests that the gains in ICICI Bank and Axis Bank are not just absolute price moves that have improved sentiment around the Bank Nifty. They have also contributed to the strong performance of the benchmark indices, helping the Nifty recover from its previous lows around 23,500 and the Bank Nifty from the 56,000 mark.""With private sector banking stocks now participating in the rally, it has boosted confidence that this trend can continue. We have remained bullish on private sector banking stocks for the past one-and-a-half to two months and expect the positive momentum to continue, particularly among the large-cap names," he added.Stock recommendation by Kunal Bothra"I have one buy and one sell recommendation. The buy is Ashok Leyland from the auto sector. The stock has registered a strong positive move over the last two trading sessions and is forming what appears to be an inverted head-and-shoulders pattern on the charts. The target is Rs 167.5, with a stop loss at Rs 157," said Bothra, adding, "the sell recommendation is Angel One. Although this is a short-term trade, the stock formed a bearish candlestick pattern on Thursday's close. A follow-through decline is expected, with a near-term target of Rs 326 and a stop loss at Rs 342."IT sector Bothra said, "I think the weakness in IT stocks has largely subsided. Over the last few days, many stocks have managed to hold their previous swing lows and have witnessed a mild recovery. Stocks such as Tech Mahindra and TCS have shown signs of improvement, while Infosys and mid-cap names like Persistent have also displayed resilience.""However, these stocks have so far been unable to break above their immediate swing highs on the daily charts. That suggests the trend remains uncertain, and it is still too early to conclude that the sector has bottomed out or that a sustained uptrend has begun.""For now, the IT sector remains a wait-and-watch story. The stocks have neither broken below their previous lows nor moved above their immediate swing highs. A decisive breakout above those resistance levels could signal the start of a stronger uptrend for the sector," he said.BFSI sector Pankaj Pande said, "overall, the BFSI sector is in a better position. Credit growth has started to improve, while the earlier challenges were largely on the deposit side. With the RBI providing some regulatory relaxation, the situation has improved. In addition, the 10-year government bond yield has declined from around 7 per cent by about 20-25 basis points, which is positive for public sector banks as well as the banking sector overall.""We also do not see significant stress on the asset quality front, suggesting that the banking sector remains in good shape. At the same time, the intensity of FII selling has eased, which points to better price performance for both private and public sector banks," he said, adding, "from this perspective, most of the key issues facing the banking sector are gradually being addressed. The margin pressures that emerged following the RBI's rate actions earlier are also expected to ease, and many of those concerns now appear to be behind us."Tailwind for the NBFCsPande said, "one factor to watch is the RBI Governor's indication that most of the conditions required for inclusion in global bond indices have been met. There could be positive developments on this front in July.""Such a move would be supportive of further softening in bond yields and would also be positive for the NBFC sector. Given its heavyweight representation, the banking sector is expected to continue doing the heavy lifting for the Nifty in the near term," he added.(Disclaimer: The above article is meant for informational purposes only, and should not be considered as any investment advice. ET NOW DIGITAL suggests its readers/audience to consult their financial advisors before making any money related decisions.)

title: 'Reckless Behaviour': India Blasts Pakistan Over Afghanistan Airstrikes
description: India slammed Pakistan's air strikes on Afghanistan, calling it a threat to regional peace. The MEA said that civilian casualties including women and children highlight Pakistan's "reckless behaviour".
content: India on Monday strongly condemned Pakistan’s air strikes on Afghan territory that resulted in civilian casualties, including women and children, calling the move a "blatant act of aggression". The strikes were an assault on Afghanistan's sovereignty and posed a direct threat to regional peace and stability, the MEA said. It also accused Pakistan of following a persistent pattern of reckless behaviour and attempting to externalise its internal failures through cross-border violence.The Ministry of External Affairs (MEA), in a statement, said, "India strongly condemns Pakistan’s air-strikes on Afghan territory that have resulted in several civilian casualties, including women and children. This blatant act of aggression by Pakistan is an assault on Afghanistan's sovereignty and a direct threat to regional peace and stability.""It reflects Pakistan's persistent pattern of reckless behaviour and its futile attempt to externalize internal failures through desperate acts of violence beyond its borders," the statement read. "India conveys its condolences to Afghan families that have lost loved ones, prays for early recovery of those injured and reiterates its unwavering support for Afghanistan’s sovereignty and territorial integrity," it added.  Pakistan on Monday said its security forces killed 29 people in a ground operation near the Afghan border and subsequent cross-border strikes. "A well-planned intelligence-based ground operation was carried out by security forces along the Pakistan-Afghan border, followed by calibrated strikes in the border region against the hideouts and safe havens of terrorists belonging to Jamaat-ul-Ahrar and Fitna-al-Khwarij, killing twenty-nine Khwarij," Information Minister Atta Tarar said.Following this, Islamabad and Kabul summoned each other's charge d'affaires to lodge diplomatic protests over the latest escalation.Pakistan summoned Afghanistan's charge d'affaires in Islamabad over the recent attack on a Pakistan Rangers headquarters in Karachi, alleging Afghan nationals and their territory were used to facilitate the assault. "Fitna-al-Khwarij" is the term officially used by Pakistan to refer to the banned Tehreek-e-Taliban Pakistan (TTP) and allied militant groups. Jamaat-ul-Ahrar is affiliated with the TTP.

title: The Supreme Court upholds Fed independence by saving Lisa Cook’s job—and also saves U.S. debt from a crisis
description: “Not only the fact of independence but also the appearance of independence is key to the Federal Reserve’s design.”
content:
The Federal Reserve retains a special status in the government that shields it from interference by the White House, the Supreme Court said in a decision that has critical implications for the bond market.



Justices ruled 5–4 on Monday that President Donald Trump was wrong to try ousting Fed Governor Lisa Cook last August because she didn’t receive due process.



Trump’s bid to fire her—the first such attempt ever—came as he was demanding the Fed lower interest rates, despite data showing inflation remained elevated, the result, in part, of his tariffs.



While Fed officials can be removed “for cause,” which has been interpreted to mean gross malfeasance or negligence, Cook was accused of committing mortgage fraud before joining the Fed. She has denied the charges and said she wasn’t given the chance to rebut the claims. Lower courts agreed with her.



“Under our precedents, Cook was entitled to notice and some opportunity to respond prior to her termination,” Chief Justice John Roberts wrote.



He also asserted the Trump administration’s argument that a president can remove a member of the Fed “at any time, for any reason, without any notice before, and without any judicial check” would render the “for-cause protection into little more than at-will employment.”



Protecting the Fed from the whims of a president is vital to the central bank’s duty to set monetary policy free of political considerations, Roberts explained.



“Not only the fact of independence but also the appearance of independence is key to the Federal Reserve’s design,” he wrote.



The Supreme Court decision on the Cook case followed a federal district judge’s dismissal earlier this year of subpoenas related to a Justice Department probe into former Fed Chair Jerome Powell.



That judge said the subpoenas appeared to be meant to pressure Powell into lowering interest rates or resigning. The Justice Department has suspended its investigation, but Powell said he will remain as a Fed governor until the case is fully resolved.



That breaks a tradition from his predecessors, who have stepped down from the Fed board when their terms as chair expired. But Powell has been a staunch defender of Fed independence. 



The Fed’s ability to fight inflation without outside meddling, especially if it entails painful rate hikes, underpins the bond market. If investors believed politics were influencing monetary policy, Treasuries would sell off as markets price in a greater likelihood of higher inflation that erodes fixed income.



That would make them less attractive to own, reducing demand just as the federal government needs to issue a flood of fresh debt to cover massive budget deficits. Bond yields would also jump and force the government to pay more to borrow money, worsening the deficit and adding further to the $39 trillion pile of U.S. debt.



In fact, the Fed’s role in the bond market was cited by ratings agency S&P Global when it reaffirmed the U.S. debt rating at AA+ on Friday. While much of the language was similar to S&P’s annual rating update from last year, it was the first one since Trump tried to fire Cook and investigate Powell.



“The institutional strength and credibility of the Federal Reserve System provide the U.S. with considerable monetary policy flexibility,” S&P said. “The central bank has helped stabilize global financial markets time and time again. We expect the Fed to continue navigating the challenges of lowering inflation and addressing financial market vulnerabilities.”



Other U.S. attributes also factored into the AA+ rating, such as the strong economy and even tariff revenue that helps offset the federal budget deficit.



But the Fed’s independence and the dollar’s role as the world’s reserve currency are pillars to the U.S. rating, according to S&P.



S&P took away the U.S.’s top AAA rating in 2011 owing to fiscal and political dysfunction. For now, the Fed is holding off another downgrade that could send more ripples through the bond market.



“The credibility of the Federal Reserve is unparalleled, supporting monetary flexibility and the role of the U.S. dollar as the premier international reserve currency,” S&P said on Friday. “These strengths help offset the U.S.’s prominent credit weakness: its fiscal trajectory.”
This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

title: Mixtape review: casual gamer’s dream with a killer soundtrack
description:
The coming-of-age tale features The Smashing Pumpkins, The Cure and more
The post Mixtape review: casual gamer’s dream with a killer soundtrack appeared first on NME.
content:
Mixtape takes casual gaming to laid-back new levels. The coming-of-age drama can be completed in a single sitting and with only one narrative thread to follow, it’s impossible to go wrong. If you’re used to spending hundreds of hours squeezing every last secret out of massive open-world games such as Elden Ring or pushing yourself to frustrating limits to get good enough to be a contender in Fortnite, Mixtape’s interactive storybook experience presents a baffling proposition.
But the minute you start skateboarding through the sun-kissed north Californian countryside setting with DEVO’s euphoric synthpop gem ‘That’s Good’ blasting through your speakers, Mixtape will make total sense.

READ MORE: The best games of 2026… so far!

The game, set in the fictional town of Blue Moon Lagoon at some point during the 1990s, follows a trio of teenage best friends out to celebrate their last night together before college and post-high school jobs send them to different corners of the country. There’s chilled out stoner Van Slater who doesn’t want anything to change, while overachiever Cassandra Morino is looking forward to a life away from her parents’ sky-high expectations. You play as Stacey Rockford, who’s eager to escape her “Big Suck” hometown, join older sister Debbie in New York and become the world’s greatest music supervisor, even if that means ditching a planned road trip with her besties.
Mixtape starts with music obsessive Stacey doing her best Fleabag impression to tell you about the technical specifications of her CD Walkman, and the emotional power that the ideal playlist commands. She’s already got the soundtrack to her last hurrah sorted but the day doesn’t go to plan. The underage mates struggle to get alcohol and come into conflict with party-pooper cops while simmering resentment between the angsty teens soon boils over. It’s a messy, melodramatic tale in the same style as Superbad or Skins.

There are various mini-games within Mixtape – control the tongues involved in a sloppy, awkward first kiss, explore a bedroom for pieces of a map leading to boozy treasure, put the batteries in a handheld Mina Master camera before exploring an abandoned dinosaur theme park – but most of your time will be spent watching lush cutscenes play out. Some gamers have been outraged at just how little control they have over the story, but the game’s lack of alternative endings doesn’t take anything away from the feel-good tale of camaraderie.
And really, Mixtape is all about the music. Indie developers Beethoven and Dinosaur based each chapter of the game around a particular tune and every needle drop is deployed with pin-point accuracy. The Smashing Pumpkins’ furious ‘Love’ accompanies a moment of adolescent destruction, David Gray’s ‘Shine’ soundtracks a sepia-toned flashback to the three pals decorating their woodland hangout and Jesus And The Mary Chain’s ‘Just Like Honey’ conjures the perfect bedroom hangout vibe. You can headbang your heart out to Silverchair’s driving anthem ‘Freak’ and Roxy Music’s celebratory ‘More Than This’ elevates a cinematic moment that mirrors The Perks Of Being A Wallflower’s iconic bridge scene.
‘Mixtape’ game. CREDIT: Beethoven & Dinosaur
There are plenty of cult classics in Mixtape as well, so be prepared to fall in love with John Paul Young’s playful alt-rock gem ‘Yesterday’s Hero’, the dreamy psychedelic pop of Harpers Bizarre’s ‘Witchi Tai To’ and The Chi-Lites’ trippy ‘Have You Seen Her’.
The love letter to playlisting wraps up with the twinkling majesty of The Cure’s ‘Plainsong’. Mixtape might not be the most challenging game around, but it’ll have you thinking twice about leaving the house without the perfect song in mind.
‘Mixtape’ is out now on Nintendo Switch, Xbox Series X/S, PC and PlayStation 5

VERDICT
Mixtape is easy to play – and even easier to fall in love with. Its interactive graphic novel gameplay might put off some diehard gamers but the deliberately messy coming-of-age story and the killer, curated soundtrack will tug at your heartstrings. At £15.99, it’s an all-killer, no-filler experience.
PROS

An ace soundtrack full of iconic hits and cult classics
The art style is full of personality
Only asks for an afternoon of your time

CONS

That kissing minigame is still grossing us out
Skating levels will have you pining for Tony Hawk’s Pro Skater
You can’t fail at any point in the game


The post Mixtape review: casual gamer’s dream with a killer soundtrack appeared first on NME.

title: Brazil vs Japan FIFA World Cup 2026: How to watch the live streaming of the match around the world?
description: Ahead of the start of the Brazil vs Japan FIFA World Cup 2026 match, let's take a look at how to watch the live streaming of the match. Get hold of the details.
content: 5-time champions Brazil will take on giant-killers Japan in the FIFA World Cup 2026 tonight. The match will take place at the Houston Stadium in Houston. The Selecao will enter as the favourites but Japan have proved time and again that they can pull off an upset.With all to look forward to, let's see what transpires in the match tonight.5 times Japan shocked the world by pulling off a major upset in the FIFA World Cup At what time will the Brazil vs Japan FIFA World Cup 2026 game kick off?India (IST): 10:30 PM MondayUSA (EDT – East Coast, e.g., New York): 1:00 PM Monday  UK (BST): 6:00 PM Monday  France (CEST): 7:00 PM Monday  Germany (CEST): 7:00 PM Monday  Brazil (BRT): 2:00 PM Monday  Portugal (WEST): 6:00 PM Monday  Argentina (ART): 2:00 PM Monday  Spain (CEST): 7:00 PM Monday  Australia (AEST, e.g., Sydney): 3:00 AM TuesdayGerman economist who correctly predicted winner of last three FIFA World Cups makes shocking prediction for Japan vs Brazil game How to watch the live streaming of Brazil vs Japan FIFA World Cup 2026 game?IndiaIndian football fans can follow the FIFA World Cup 2026 through television and digital platforms. Fans can watch the live telecast of the match on the Unite8 Sport channel. Digital viewers can catch the live streaming on Zee5.USAAll matches are available in English on FOX Sports platforms, while Spanish-language coverage is provided by Telemundo and Universo. Streaming is available through the FOX Sports App, FOX One and Peacock.UKFootball fans in the United Kingdom can watch every World Cup match free-to-air on BBC and ITV, with live streaming available via BBC iPlayer and ITVX.AustraliaAustralian viewers can watch every match live on SBS and SBS Viceland, with streaming available on SBS On Demand.SpainIn Spain, World Cup coverage is available through RTVE and DAZN, with matches streamed via RTVE Play and the DAZN platform.BrazilBrazilian fans can tune in via TV Globo, SBT and CazéTV. Streaming options include Globoplay and CazéTV's digital platforms.ArgentinaCoverage in Argentina is provided by Telefe, TV Pública and TyC Sports, with online streaming available through their respective digital services.PortugalPortuguese viewers can follow the tournament through local sports broadcasters and streaming services, including RTP and associated digital platforms.FranceFrench coverage is led by M6 and beIN Sports. Fans can stream matches through 6play and beIN CONNECT.GermanyIn Germany, World Cup matches are available on ARD, ZDF and MagentaTV. Live streaming can be accessed through ARD Mediathek, ZDF's digital platform and MagentaTV.

title: ମା’ ମଝିଘରିଆଣୀ ମନ୍ଦିରରୁ ରେକର୍ଡ ଆୟ: ୧.୨୬ କୋଟିରୁ ଅଧିକ ଟଙ୍କା ସହ ୩୨ ଗ୍ରାମ୍‌ ମିଳିଲା ସୁନା
description:
ରାୟଗଡ଼ା,୨୯।୬(କୈଳସ ଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ପୃଷ୍ଟି ): ରାୟଗଡ଼ା ଜିଲାର ଅଧିଷ୍ଠାତ୍ରୀ ଦେବୀ ମା’ ମଝିଘରିଆଣୀଙ୍କ ମନ୍ଦିରର ୯ଟି ଦାନହୁଣ୍ଡି ସୋମବାର ସକାଳେ କଡ଼ା ସୁରକ୍ଷା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଖୋଲାଯାଇଛି। ମାଜିଷ୍ଟ୍ରେଟ୍‌, ରାୟଗଡ଼ା ତହସିଲ ପ୍ରଶାସନ,ପୋଲିସ ଏବଂ ମନ୍ଦିର ପରିଚାଳନା କମିଟିର ଉପସ୍ଥିତିରେ ହୁଣ୍ଡିଗୁଡ଼ିକ ଖୋଲାଯାଇଛି। ପ୍ରାୟ ୨୫୦ରୁ ଅଧିକ ସ୍ବେଚ୍ଛାସେବୀଙ୍କ ସହଯୋଗରେ ଗଣତି ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଗଣତି ଶେଷରେ ନଗଦ ଓ ଅନଲାଇନ୍‌ ଦାନକୁ ମିଶାଇ ମୋଟ ୧ କୋଟି ୨୬ ଲକ୍ଷ ୨୬ ହଜାର ୮୫୪ ଟଙ୍କା ସଂଗ୍ରହ ହୋଇଥିବା […]
The post ମା’ ମଝିଘରିଆଣୀ ମନ୍ଦିରରୁ ରେକର୍ଡ ଆୟ: ୧.୨୬ କୋଟିରୁ ଅଧିକ ଟଙ୍କା ସହ ୩୨ ଗ୍ରାମ୍‌ ମିଳିଲା ସୁନା appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ରାୟଗଡ଼ା,୨୯।୬(କୈଳସ ଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ପୃଷ୍ଟି ): ରାୟଗଡ଼ା ଜିଲାର ଅଧିଷ୍ଠାତ୍ରୀ ଦେବୀ ମା’ ମଝିଘରିଆଣୀଙ୍କ ମନ୍ଦିରର ୯ଟି ଦାନହୁଣ୍ଡି ସୋମବାର ସକାଳେ କଡ଼ା ସୁରକ୍ଷା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଖୋଲାଯାଇଛି। ମାଜିଷ୍ଟ୍ରେଟ୍‌, ରାୟଗଡ଼ା ତହସିଲ ପ୍ରଶାସନ,ପୋଲିସ ଏବଂ ମନ୍ଦିର ପରିଚାଳନା କମିଟିର ଉପସ୍ଥିତିରେ ହୁଣ୍ଡିଗୁଡ଼ିକ ଖୋଲାଯାଇଛି। ପ୍ରାୟ ୨୫୦ରୁ ଅଧିକ ସ୍ବେଚ୍ଛାସେବୀଙ୍କ ସହଯୋଗରେ ଗଣତି ହୋଇଥିଲା।
ଗଣତି ଶେଷରେ ନଗଦ ଓ ଅନଲାଇନ୍‌ ଦାନକୁ ମିଶାଇ ମୋଟ ୧ କୋଟି ୨୬ ଲକ୍ଷ ୨୬ ହଜାର ୮୫୪ ଟଙ୍କା ସଂଗ୍ରହ ହୋଇଥିବା ବେଳେ ୩୨ ଗ୍ରାମ୍‌ ସୁନା, ୧ କିଲୋ ୩୦୦ ଗ୍ରାମ୍‌ ରୁପା ଏବଂ ୯ଟି ବିଦେଶୀ ମୁଦ୍ରା ମଧ୍ୟ ମିଳିଛି। ଅନଲାଇନ୍‌ ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ୩ ଲକ୍ଷ ୯୭ ହଜାର ୨୩୧ ଟଙ୍କା ଦାନ ମିଳିଛି। ପୂର୍ବବର୍ଷ ତୁଳନାରେ ଏଥର ଅଧିକ ଦାନରାଶି ସଂଗ୍ରହ ହୋଇଥିବାରୁ ମନ୍ଦିର ପରିଚାଳନା କମିଟି ସନ୍ତୋଷ ପ୍ରକାଶ କରିଛି। ଗଣତି କାର୍ଯ୍ୟରେ ମନ୍ଦିର ପରିଚାଳନା କମିଟିର ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ରାଇସିଂ ବିଡ଼ିକା, ସଦସ୍ୟ ଦେବେନ୍ଦ୍ର ବେହେରା, ରାଧାକୃଷ୍ଣ ଦଳାଇ, ଆକାଉଣ୍ଟାଣ୍ଟ ଏସ୍‌. ଭେଙ୍କଟ ରାଓ ପ୍ରମୁଖ ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ରହି ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟାର ତଦାରଖ କରିଥିଲେ।
ଗତ ଜାନୁଆରୀ ୧୯ ତାରିଖରେ ହୋଇଥିବା ଗଣତିରେ ୧ କୋଟି ୫ ଲକ୍ଷ ୫୨ ହଜାର ୮୪୫ ଟଙ୍କା, ୩୦ ଗ୍ରାମ ସୁନା, ୨ କିଲୋ ୧୫୦ ଗ୍ରାମ ରୁପା ଓ ବିଦେଶୀ ମୁଦ୍ରା ମିଳିଥିଲା। ସେହିପରି ଗତବର୍ଷ ଜୁଲାଇ ୭ ତାରିଖରେ ହୋଇଥିବା ଗଣତିରେ ୧ କୋଟି ୪ ଲକ୍ଷ ୩୬ ହଜାର ୯୬୩ ଟଙ୍କା, ୩୮ ଗ୍ରାମ୍‌ ସୁନା, ୨ କିଲୋ ୫୦୫ ଗ୍ରାମ ରୂପା ଏବଂ ୧୨ଟି ବିଦେଶୀ ମୁଦ୍ରା ମିଳିଛି।
ସଂଗୃହୀତ ଦାନରାଶିକୁ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଗ୍ରାମୀଣ ବ୍ୟାଙ୍କର ସହଯୋଗରେ ମା’ ମଝିଘରିଆଣୀ ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟର ବ୍ୟାଙ୍କ ଖାତାରେ ଜମା କରାଯିବ ବୋଲି ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ରାଇସିଂ ବିଡ଼ିକା ସୂଚନା ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ଗଣତି କାର୍ଯ୍ୟରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଗ୍ରାମୀଣ ବ୍ୟାଙ୍କର ଆଞ୍ଚଳିକ ପ୍ରବନ୍ଧକ ଦେବେଶ ରଞ୍ଜନ ଧର, ରାୟଗଡ଼ା ଶାଖା ପରିଚାଳକ ବିଜୟ କୁମାର ବାରିକ, ରାୟଗଡ଼ା ବଜାର ଶାଖା ପରିଚାଳକ ପ୍ରଜ୍ଞାରଞ୍ଜନ ରଥଙ୍କ ସମେତ ଅନ୍ୟ ବ୍ୟାଙ୍କ କର୍ମଚାରୀମାନେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ଥିଲେ।
 

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

 
The post ମା’ ମଝିଘରିଆଣୀ ମନ୍ଦିରରୁ ରେକର୍ଡ ଆୟ: ୧.୨୬ କୋଟିରୁ ଅଧିକ ଟଙ୍କା ସହ ୩୨ ଗ୍ରାମ୍‌ ମିଳିଲା ସୁନା appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Jesse Eisenberg opens up about turning down Aaron Sorkin's 'The Social Network 2'
description: In a surprising turn, Jesse Eisenberg shared why he won’t reprise his iconic portrayal of Mark Zuckerberg for 'The Social Network 2,' titled 'The Social Reckoning.' Although he respects Aaron Sorkin's work, Eisenberg feels drawn to different paths in life and prefers not to deepen his connection to the character. Jeremy Strong is rumored to step into Zuckerberg's shoes for the film.

title: Resident doctors in England accept pay deal and end strikes
description: Doctors have been locked in a three-year dispute with the government, resulting in several rounds of strikes.

title: J&K H&UD Dept bars stray dog relocation; notifies guidelines on feeding spots, animal welfare
description:
Srinagar, June 29: The Housing and Urban Development Department, Jammu and Kashmir, today said that it is committed to implement the Supreme Court’s directions in Suo Motu Writ Petition (Civil) number 5 of 2025 concerning the welfare, protection and management of the stray animals.
Clarifying the rules for citizens, RWAs and animal welfare groups, the Department said feeding of community dogs is not prohibited but must be done only at designated feeding spots. It added that the additional feeding spots are being identified and notified across urban areas of J&K based on the population of community dogs in each ward.
The department has urged the residents to cooperate with their Municipal Corporation, Council or Committee in creating these designated spots, preferably away from the children’s parks or market areas in open and clean spaces so that hungry animals do not attack the children or passersby.
According to an official communique issued here in this regard, the department stressed that the relocation or removal of stray dogs by the individuals, groups or Residents’ Welfare Associations is strictly prohibited and constitutes an offence under applicable laws and the directions of the Supreme Court. It added that areas for relocation are being identified in every municipality. Until then, RWAs, citizen associations and NGOs should help feed the stray animals at designated spots and assist with sterilization and vaccination at nearby veterinary facilities.
 The Department said that “little support coming from each citizen group will go a long way in addressing this menace in a humane and compassionate manner.”
“Harassing, assaulting, injuring or inflicting cruelty upon stray animals is illegal and will attract appropriate legal action under the relevant provisions of law”, maintained the department.
Appealing to all the citizens, animal welfare organizations and RWAs to act with compassion for the mutual coexistence of all living beings, the department said the measures are in the interest of both the public safety and animal welfare.
For further assistance, the residents can contact their respective Municipal Corporation, Municipal Council, Municipal Committee or officials of the Animal Husbandry Department.

title: India shifted 12 LPG vessels, reworked refineries to avoid fuel supply disruptions, says Hardeep Singh Puri
description: India successfully navigated the Strait of Hormuz disruption by relocating LPG vessels, increasing refinery output, expanding import sources, and implementing emergency measures to ensure uninterrupted fuel and cooking gas supplies.
content: Union Petroleum Minister Hardeep Singh Puri on Monday said India successfully relocated more than 12 LPG carriers away from the Strait of Hormuz without incurring additional transit charges and swiftly modified refinery operations to increase cooking gas production during a major global energy disruption.Speaking about the period when the Strait of Hormuz remained shut for nearly four months, Puri said India managed to maintain uninterrupted fuel supplies across the country through a combination of contingency planning, diversified imports and rapid infrastructure adjustments.In a post on social media platform X and an accompanying article, the minister highlighted the government's efforts to protect consumers from the impact of the disruption. According to him, India ensured steady availability of petroleum products and LPG by sourcing crude oil from a wider range of countries, strengthening energy infrastructure and implementing emergency measures to secure cooking gas supplies.“India endured the closure of Hormuz and supplied itself through it without any shortages anywhere in the country. Today the stocks are full, the pumps are open, and the Indian consumer has paid less for energy through this crisis than any consumer in the world,” Puri said.Among the key steps taken during the period were a Rs 10-per-litre reduction in central excise duty on fuels in March, safeguards for domestic LPG availability, mandatory digital authentication to prevent diversion and black marketing, restrictions on excessive cylinder purchases to curb hoarding, and directives to refineries to maximise LPG output.Puri noted that several refineries were re-engineered within days to boost cooking gas production. As a result, daily LPG output increased from 35 thousand metric tonnes to 54 thousand metric tonnes. India also expanded its sourcing network by securing LPG supplies from countries such as Algeria, Japan and Canada, while additional cargoes were procured from the United States.The minister credited India's resilience during the crisis to years of preparation. He pointed out that the country's crude oil sourcing network has expanded from 27 countries to 41, while import terminals, pipeline connectivity and storage capacity have also seen significant growth.Describing the episode as one of the biggest energy challenges in recent memory, Puri said the government's preparedness helped shield nearly 150 crore Indians from the impact of global supply disruptions.

title: খং উঠিল বিধায়ক অখিল গগৈৰঃ ঠিকাদাৰক অন কেমেৰা দিলে ধমক
description:
ডিজিটেল ডেস্কঃ ৰংঘৰ উন্নয়ন প্ৰকল্পৰ কামৰ অগ্ৰগতি পৰিদৰ্শন কৰিবলৈ আহি খং উঠিল বিধায়ক অখিল গগৈৰ। প্ৰকল্পটোৰ কামত হেমাহি আৰু লেহেমীয়া গতি লক্ষ্য কৰি ঠিকাদাৰক ফোনত ধমক দিলে বিধায়ক গৰাকীয়ে।
পৰিদৰ্শনৰ সময়ত অখিল গগৈয়ে ঠিকাদাৰক ফোন কৰি কেমেৰাৰ সন্মুখত কয়, "মোক ধেমালি বুলি ভাবি আছা নেকি? ক'ত কাম কৰিছা জানানে নাই! দালালি কৰি ঠিকা লৈ এতিয়া কাম চাবলৈ নাহা।" 
কামৰ গুণগত মান আৰু অগ্ৰগতি দুয়োটাতে অসন্তুষ্টি প্ৰকাশ কৰে অখিল গগৈয়ে। পৰৱৰ্তী সময়ত সামাজিক মাধ্যমত প্ৰতিক্ৰিয়া প্ৰকাশ কৰি বিধায়কজনে কয় যে, "শিৱসাগৰ সমষ্টিৰ ৰংঘৰ প্ৰকল্পটো শিৱসাগৰবাসীৰ বাবে এটা সপোনৰ প্ৰকল্প। কিন্তু ঠিকাদাৰে কামত হেমাহি কৰা পৰিলক্ষিত হৈছে। শিৱসাগৰবাসীৰ আশা-আৱেগক লৈ হেতালি খেলা কোনো কাৰ্যক কোনোপধ্যেই সহজে লোৱা নহ'ব।"
তেওঁ লগতে উল্লেখ কৰে যে, প্ৰকল্পটো পৰিদৰ্শনৰ সময়ত সংশ্লিষ্ট বিভাগৰ কাৰ্যবাহী অভিযন্তা, আন অভিযন্তা আৰু কেইবাগৰাকী চৰকাৰী বিষয়াৰ উপস্থিতিত কামৰ অগ্ৰগতিৰ বুজ লোৱা হয়। কাম যাতে নিৰ্ধাৰিত সময়সীমাৰ ভিতৰত আৰু মানদণ্ড অক্ষুণ্ণ ৰাখি সম্পূৰ্ণ হয়, সেই দিশত সংশ্লিষ্ট পক্ষক কঠোৰ নিৰ্দেশনা দিয়া হৈছে।

title: ଆଫଗାନିସ୍ତାନ ସୀମାରେ ପାକ୍‌ର ବଡ଼ ସାମରିକ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ
description:
ଇସ୍‌ଲାମାବାଦ,୨୯ା୬: ଆଫଗାନିସ୍ତାନ ସୀମାରେ ପାକିସ୍ତାନୀ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ବଳର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନରେ ୨୯ଜଣ ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀ ନିହତ ହୋଇଥିବା ଇସ୍‌ଲାମାବାଦ ସୋମବାର କହିଛି। ଏହି ସଦ୍ୟ ଉତ୍ତେଜନାକୁ ନେଇ ଉଭୟ କାବୁଲ ଓ ଇସ୍‌ଲାମାବାଦ ପରସ୍ପରର କୂଟନୀତିଜ୍ଞଙ୍କୁ ସମନ ଜାରି କରି ପ୍ରତିବାଦ ଜଣାଇଛନ୍ତି। କରାଚିସ୍ଥିତ ପାକିସ୍ତାନ ରେଞ୍ଜର୍ସଙ୍କ ମୁଖ୍ୟାଳୟ ଉପରେ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ପାଇଁ ଇସ୍‌ଲାମାବାଦ ଆଫଗାନିସ୍ତାନକୁ ଦାୟୀ କରିଛି। ଅନ୍ୟପକ୍ଷରେ ପାକିସ୍ତାନୀ ସେନା ଆଫଗାନିସ୍ତାନର ବାୟୁସୀମା ଓ ସାର୍ବଭୌମତ୍ୱ ଉଲ୍ଲଂଘନ କରି କୁନାର ଓ ପାକ୍‌ଟିକା ପ୍ରଦେଶରେ ଜନବସତି ଉପରେ […]
The post ଆଫଗାନିସ୍ତାନ ସୀମାରେ ପାକ୍‌ର ବଡ଼ ସାମରିକ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଇସ୍‌ଲାମାବାଦ,୨୯ା୬: ଆଫଗାନିସ୍ତାନ ସୀମାରେ ପାକିସ୍ତାନୀ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ବଳର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନରେ ୨୯ଜଣ ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀ ନିହତ ହୋଇଥିବା ଇସ୍‌ଲାମାବାଦ ସୋମବାର କହିଛି। ଏହି ସଦ୍ୟ ଉତ୍ତେଜନାକୁ ନେଇ ଉଭୟ କାବୁଲ ଓ ଇସ୍‌ଲାମାବାଦ ପରସ୍ପରର କୂଟନୀତିଜ୍ଞଙ୍କୁ ସମନ ଜାରି କରି ପ୍ରତିବାଦ ଜଣାଇଛନ୍ତି।
କରାଚିସ୍ଥିତ ପାକିସ୍ତାନ ରେଞ୍ଜର୍ସଙ୍କ ମୁଖ୍ୟାଳୟ ଉପରେ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ପାଇଁ ଇସ୍‌ଲାମାବାଦ ଆଫଗାନିସ୍ତାନକୁ ଦାୟୀ କରିଛି। ଅନ୍ୟପକ୍ଷରେ ପାକିସ୍ତାନୀ ସେନା ଆଫଗାନିସ୍ତାନର ବାୟୁସୀମା ଓ ସାର୍ବଭୌମତ୍ୱ ଉଲ୍ଲଂଘନ କରି କୁନାର ଓ ପାକ୍‌ଟିକା ପ୍ରଦେଶରେ ଜନବସତି ଉପରେ ଏୟାରଷ୍ଟ୍ରାଇକ୍‌ କରିଥିବା ନେଇ କାବୁଲ ପ୍ରତିବାଦ ଜଣାଇଛି।
The post ଆଫଗାନିସ୍ତାନ ସୀମାରେ ପାକ୍‌ର ବଡ଼ ସାମରିକ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: സെക്രട്ടറിയേറ്റ് മാർച്ചിലെ സംഘർഷത്തിൽ ബ്ലേഡ് ഉപയോ​ഗിച്ച സംഭവം; എസ്എഫ്ഐ ജില്ലാ സെക്രട്ടറി അറസ്റ്റിൽ
description: എആർ ക്യാമ്പിലേക്ക് മാറ്റിയ നന്ദനെ കോടതിയിൽ ഹാജരാക്കും. സംഘർഷ കേസിൽ മൂന്നാമത്തെ അറസ്റ്റാണിത്.
content: <p>തിരുവനന്തപുരം: സെക്രട്ടറിയേറ്റ് മാർച്ചിലുണ്ടായ സംഘർഷ കേസിൽ എസ്എഫ്ഐ ജില്ലാ സെക്രട്ടറി നന്ദൻ അറസ്റ്റിൽ. ബ്ലെയ്ഡ് ഉപയോഗിച്ച് സമരം നടത്തി സംഘർഷമുണ്ടാക്കിയ കേസിലെ പ്രതിയാണ് നന്ദൻ. സിപിഎം ജില്ലാ കമ്മിറ്റി ഓഫീസിൽ നിന്നും മടങ്ങുന്ന വഴിയാണ് കന്റോൺമെന്റ് പൊലീസ് അറസ്റ്റ് ചെയ്തത്. എആർ ക്യാമ്പിലേക്ക് മാറ്റിയ നന്ദനെ കോടതിയിൽ ഹാജരാക്കും. സംഘർഷ കേസിൽ മൂന്നാമത്തെ അറസ്റ്റാണിത്.</p><p></p><p>&nbsp;</p>

title: Nifty Prediction for Tuesday, June 30: Bearish candlestick on daily chart, experts see choppy trade; check crucial support, resistance levels
description: Nifty Prediction for Tuesday, June 30 by experts: As markets enter a fresh trading session on Tuesday, June 30, analysts expect the key benchmark index, Nifty, to remain range-bound, with 23,800 as the key support, while the 24,100-24,250 zone is likely to act as immediate resistance.
content: Nifty Prediction for Tuesday, June 30: Indian equity markets ended lower on Monday, June 29, as investors booked profits and remain cautious over renewed geopolitical hostilities regarding the sustainability of the interim peace agreement between the United States and Iran and rising oil prices.As markets enter a fresh trading session on Tuesday, June 30, analysts expect the key benchmark index, Nifty, to remain range-bound, with 23,800 as the key support, while the 24,100-24,250 zone is likely to act as immediate resistance.Nifty 50 at close on Monday, June 29 The Nifty 50 index closed at 23,946.25, down 109.75 points or 0.46 per cent. The BSE Sensex also settled in the red at 76,728.37, declining 372.10 points or 0.48 per cent.Nifty top gainers and losers on Monday, June 29 Among the top gainers in the Nifty 50 index were Max Healthcare, Dr Reddy's Laboratories, Coal India, Eternal, Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL), Trent, SBI Life Insurance, Power Grid and Hindalco.The top losers included Kotak Mahindra Bank, Mahindra & Mahindra, Adani Enterprises, Tata Motors and InterGlobe Aviation (IndiGo).Nifty Prediction for Tuesday, June 30 by experts Analysts believe Tuesday's session is likely to be driven by whether the Nifty manages to defend the 23,800 support area. Further, the technical analysts predict that tomorrow’s session will likely be characterized by defensive trading and consolidation.  Related News | Stock Market Closing on Monday, June 29: Sensex down 372 points, Nifty below 23,950 - Key reasons behind the fallNifty Prediction for Tuesday, June 30 by Sachin GuptaAccording to Sachin Gupta, Vice President - Technical Research at Choice Broking, the benchmark index has formed a bearish candlestick on the daily chart after failing to hold early gains, indicating sustained selling pressure during the latter half of Monday's session.“The close near the day's low indicates that bears maintained control, with buyers failing to regain momentum after the initial strength,” he said.From a technical perspective, Gupta said immediate support is placed in the 23,750–23,800 zone, while resistance is observed in the 24,100–24,150 range. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 53.89, indicating neutral momentum with a slightly positive bias despite the day's weakness, he said.He added that the volatility index, India VIX, rose 4.29% to close at 13.61, indicating a modest increase in market volatility and cautious sentiment among participants. In the derivatives segment, notable call writing was observed at the 24,000 and 24,100 strikes, while put writing was concentrated at the 24,000 and 23,800 levels, suggesting immediate resistance around the 24,000–24,100 zone while support remains near the lower strike.Gupta said, “Indian equity benchmark Nifty index witnessed a negative close on 29th June 2026. The index opened with a marginal gap-up of 5.75 points at 24,061.75 compared to the previous close of 24,056.00. Buying interest dominated the first half of the session, pushing the index to an intraday high of 24,120.00. However, selling pressure emerged towards the end of the first half, dragging the index into negative territory. The weakness persisted throughout the remainder of the session, with the index slipping to an intraday low of 23,924.55 near the close before finally settling at 23,946.25, ending the day with a decline of 109.75 points or 0.46%.”Sectorally, the market witnessed a broadly negative trend with Auto, IT, Media, Oil & Gas, Chemicals, Cement, Consumer Durables, PSU Banks, Realty, and Private Banks ending in the red. On the other hand, Pharma, Healthcare, Metals, Midcap Healthcare, and Nifty 500 Healthcare outperformed and provided some support to the broader market. Market breadth remained weak, with 2,036 declines against 1,330 advances, indicating that selling pressure was widespread despite resilience in select defensive sectors, he added.20 Day EMA - 23,822.5550 Day EMA - 23,847.25100 Day EMA - 24,135.44200 Day EMA - 24,435.16Nifty Prediction for Tuesday, June 30 by Nagaraj ShettiNagaraj Shetti, Senior Technical Research Analyst at HDFC Securities said that a small negative candle was formed on the daily chart with minor upper and lower shadow.“Technically this market action signals failed breakout of the hurdle and also range movement at 24200 levels. This could signal more weakness down to the lower range of around 23800 likely ahead,” he said.He further said that after showing weakness from the crucial resistance of around 24200 on Thursday, Nifty continued with decline amidst choppy movement on Monday and closed the day lower by 109 points. “After opening on a flat note, the market failed to sustain the early session bounce and later slipped into weakness amidst range movement in the mid to later part of the session,” Shetti further stated.  He expects the market to remain volatile over the next one to two sessions before attempting a rebound. “The short-term trend of Nifty has turned weak with range bound action. There is a possibility of more choppy movements in the next 1-2 sessions before bouncing back again from the lows. The next lower supports to be watched at 23800 levels and immediate resistance is placed at 24250,” the expert concluded.Sectoral indices on Monday, June 29 Among sectoral indices on the NSE, only Nifty Pharma and Nifty Metal managed to close higher. Nifty Pharma gained 1.03 per cent, while Nifty Metal rose 0.80 per cent.All other major sectoral indices ended in the red. Nifty Auto fell 2 per cent, Nifty IT declined 1.07 per cent, Nifty FMCG slipped 0.59 per cent, Nifty Media lost 1.32 per cent and Nifty PSU Bank dropped 0.95 per cent.On Thursday, the Sensex settled 109.25 points, or 0.14 per cent, higher at 77,100.47. The Nifty rose by 34.35 points, or 0.14 per cent, to end at 24,056.(Disclaimer: The above article is meant for informational purposes only, and should not be considered as any investment advice. ET NOW DIGITAL suggests its readers/audience to consult their financial advisors before making any money-related decisions.)

title: Security forces recover arms, ammunition from hideout in Baramulla
description:
Srinagar, Jun 29: Security forces on Monday recovered a cache of arms and ammunition from a hideout in Sopore area of Baramulla district in Jammu and Kashmir, officials said.
During a search operation in Warpora area of Sopore, they recovered arms and ammunition, including an AK rifle, a magazine, 30 rounds of ammunition, a Under barrel grenade launcher and three UBGL grenades, they added.

title: 5 times Japan shocked the world by pulling off a major upset in the FIFA World Cup
description: Ahead of the start of the Japan vs Brazil FIFA World Cup 2026 match, let's take a look at occasions when Japan shocked the world by coming out as the unlikely winner at the grandest stage.
content: Japan will take on Brazil in the Round of 32 stage of the FIFA World Cup 2026 tonight and have the opportunity to pull off one of the biggest upsets in the history of the competition. Japan are known to punch above their weight, so, if they manage to down the 5-time champions today, it would not be the first time they have killed a giant.Ahead of the start of the match, let's list five instances from the past when Japan emerged as the unlikely winner. Japan's tendency to pull off an upset have increased over time, and tonight could be the day when they can script another chapter for the history books.German economist who correctly predicted winner of last three FIFA World Cups makes shocking prediction for Japan vs Brazil gameJapan 1–0 Russia (2002)Japan's first-ever World Cup victory was against Russia, who have a pedigree in football. They were even the top European side back then and walked into the match as favourites. However, Japan found the back of the net once and held the lead until the end. The win took the now Asian giants into the Round of 16.Japan 3–1 Denmark (2010)Japan picked up another victory in the Round of 32 in 2010. This time they hammered Denmark by a scoreline of 3-1 to advance to the last 16.Japan 2–1 Colombia (2018)This was the first time an Asian team beat a South American team in a World Cup. Colombia were a strong side expected to top the group.Japan 2–1 Spain (2022)Japan emerged as the force to be reckoned with in the 2022 FIFA World Cup. They pulled off their biggest win the history of the FIFA World Cup 2026 against Spain, beating them 2-1 in the group stage. Spain were reigning European champions and heavily favored. Japan topped the group (with Germany & Costa Rica) thanks to this result.Japan 2–1 Germany (2022)Germany were one of the pre-tournament favorites and former world champions. Japan came from behind to win. One of the biggest shocks of the tournament. This, along with victory over Spain, are Japan's biggest wins at the grandest stage of the sport.FIFA World Cup 2026: List of teams qualified for Round of 32, eliminated teams, knockout schedule and key matchups

title: Amarnath Yatra: On-the-spot registration token distribution to begin in Jammu from Tuesday
description:
Jammu, Jun 29: The distribution of tokens for on-the-spot registration of pilgrims participating in the annual Amarnath yatra will begin on Tuesday in Jammu, with the registration process set to start the following day, Deputy Commissioner Jammu Rakesh Minhas said here on Monday.
The 57-day annual pilgrimage to the 3,880-metre-high Amarnath cave shrine is scheduled to begin on July 3 from two routes: the traditional 48-km Nunwan-Pahalgam track in Anantnag district and the shorter yet steeper 14-km Baltal route in Ganderbal district. The first group of pilgrims will depart from Bhagwati Nagar Yatri Niwas in Jammu on July 2.
"Ten token counters have been established at the Tawi riverfront, and token distribution will begin transparently from 6 am on Tuesday. Registration and RFID issuance and registration for token holders will commence from the next day", he told reporters here.
Minhas mentioned that extensive arrangements have been made to facilitate the pilgrims, including improved registration facilities, accommodation, sanitation, security, and traffic management.
"For the convenience of pilgrims, our token centre, along with e-KYC and RFID registration counters, will operate at the Tawi Riverfront. Registration counters will also function at Geeta Bhawan, Ram Mandir and Bhagwati Nagar, as in previous years," he said.
He said the administration has created comprehensive facilities at the venue, including accommodation for around 4,000 pilgrims, more than 100 toilets and bathing units, round-the-clock community kitchens (langars), bedding, fans and other essential amenities.
"We have left no stone unturned in our preparations. Whether it is security arrangements or pilgrim facilities, every effort has been made to ensure a comfortable stay for devotees in Jammu," Minhas said.
He appealed to the people of Jammu to extend their traditional Dogra hospitality, urging transport operators, traders, shopkeepers, and hoteliers to treat every pilgrim as a guest and refrain from overcharging.
"This is not the time for overcharging. If you encounter a lost pilgrim, please guide them to the right place. Even offering a glass of water reflects the generosity for which Jammu is known," he added.
Minhas emphasised the administration's desire for Jammu to be recognised as more than just a transit point for the pilgrimage.
"Jammu is the city of temples. We want pilgrims to spend time here, visit our markets, explore tourist and religious sites and experience our culture and cuisine. We will soon unveil a new initiative to encourage pilgrims to visit places such as Bahu fort, Ranbireshwar temple, Raghunath temple, Akhnoor fort and the retreat ceremony at Chakan da Bagh," he said.
The deputy commissioner assured that normal life in the city would remain largely unaffected during the yatra, as no roads would be closed this year.
"In previous years, road closures caused inconvenience to both pilgrims and residents. This year, despite extensive arrangements, no roads will be closed, and normal movement in the city will continue," he said.
Minhas stated that the Tawi riverfront would serve as the main facilitation centre for pilgrims and urged residents to direct visiting devotees to the venue. "Two entry points have been provided from the railway station side, including one from the Narwal side, with registration counters set up at both locations".
Clarifying the token distribution process, he said that every pilgrim must collect the token in person, and only one token would be issued to each eligible pilgrim.
"Everyone, including family members, will have to stand in the queue individually. Children below 13 years and persons above 70 years are not eligible to undertake the pilgrimage, as per the prescribed norms," he said.
Regarding complaints about fake tokens and registration scams, Minhas warned of strict action against anyone found deceiving pilgrims.
"Some unauthorised centres issue coupon cards for particular dates after collecting money from pilgrims. Strict action was taken against such operators in previous years, and the same will be done this year. Anyone, whether local or from outside Jammu and Kashmir, found indulging in such activities will face stringent action," he added.

title: লামডিঙত চাঞ্চল্যঃ আত্মহননৰ চেষ্টা এজন যুৱকৰ
description:
ডিজিটেল সংবাদ, লামডিংঃ লামডিঙত এক চাঞ্চল্যকৰ ঘটনা সংঘটিত হয়। এগৰাকী যুৱকে নিজৰ জীৱন শেষ কৰাৰ উদ্দেশ্যে চোকা অস্ত্ৰৰে নিজৰ ডিঙিত গভীৰভাৱে আঘাত কৰি আত্মহননৰ চেষ্টা চলায়। বৰ্তমান সংকটজনক অৱস্থাত যুৱকজনক চিকিৎসালয়ত ভৰ্তি কৰোৱা হৈছে। 
উল্লেখ্য যে, যুৱকজনৰ নাম সুমন দে' বুলি জানিব পৰা গৈছে। কৰ্মসূত্ৰে সুমন দে' লামডিঙৰ শান্তিপাৰাৰ এটা ভাড়াঘৰত বাস কৰিছিল। এই ভাড়াতীয়া ঘৰতে তেওঁ এই ভয়ংকৰ কাণ্ডটো সংঘটিত কৰে।
ঘটনাটো সোমবাৰে পুৱাৰ ভাগতে সংঘটিত হোৱাৰ সন্দেহ কৰা হৈছে। ওচৰ-চুবুৰীয়াই সুমনক উদ্ধাৰ কৰে আৰু ততাতৈয়াকৈ লামডিং অসামৰিক চিকিৎসালয়লৈ লৈ আনে। কিন্তু তেওঁৰ স্বাস্থ্যৰ অৱস্থা অতি সংকটজনক হোৱা বাবে চিকিৎসকে প্ৰাথমিক চিকিৎসা প্ৰদান কৰি উন্নত চিকিৎসাৰ বাবে ডিফু চিকিৎসা মহাবিদ্যালয় আৰু হাস্পতাললৈ প্ৰেৰণ কৰে।
 ইপিনে কিয় বা কি পৰিস্থিতিত পৰি এনেধৰণৰ চৰম পন্থা বাছি ল’বলগীয়া হ’ল, সেই সন্দৰ্ভত এতিয়ালৈকে কোনো সঠিক কাৰণ জানিব পৰা হোৱা নাই। ঘটনাৰ খবৰ পোৱাৰ পাছত লামডিং আৰক্ষী ঘটাস্থলীত উপস্থিত হৈ তদন্ত আৰম্ভ কৰিছে।

title: കളിയാക്കി എന്നാരോപിച്ച് ഏഴാം ക്ലാസുകാരനെ ചൂരൽ കൊണ്ടടിച്ച് അധ്യാപകൻ, മുഖത്തും കൈകൊണ്ട് അടിച്ചു, കേസെടുത്ത് വണ്ടൻമേട് പൊലീസ്
description: മാതാപിതാക്കൾ നൽകിയ പരാതിയിലാണ് ജുവനൈൽ ജസ്റ്റിസ് ആക്ട് അടക്കം ചുമത്തി പോലീസ് കേസെടുത്തത്. പരാതിയില്ലെന്ന് മാതാപിതാക്കൾ അറിയിച്ചെങ്കിലും അന്വേഷണം തുടരാനാണ് പോലീസിന്റെ തീരുമാനം.
content: <p>ഇടുക്കി: ഇടുക്കി അണക്കരയിൽ ഏഴാം ക്ലാസ്സുകാരനെ അദ്ധ്യാപകൻ മർദിച്ച സംഭവത്തിൽ വണ്ടൻമേട് പോലീസ് കേസെടുത്തു. അധ്യാപകനോട് ഒരു മാസം അവധിയിൽ പോകാൻ പിടിഎ നിർദേശിച്ചു. സംഭവത്തിൽ പ്രതിഷേധിച്ച് എസ്എഫ്ഐ സ്കൂളിലേക്ക് പ്രതിഷേധ മാർച്ച് നടത്തി.</p><p>വ്യാഴാഴ്ചയാണ് അണക്കര ഗവൺമെൻറ് സ്കൂളിലെ ഏഴാം ക്ലാസ് വിദ്യാർത്ഥിയെ അധ്യാപകൻ മർദ്ദിച്ചതായി പരാതി ഉയർന്നത്. തമിഴ് മീഡിയം അധ്യാപകൻ ശിവകുമാറാണ് മർദ്ദിച്ചത്. കളിയാക്കി എന്നാരോപിച്ച് ചൂരൽ കൊണ്ട് തുടയിലും ദേഹത്തും അടിച്ചെന്നും മുഖത്ത് കൈകൊണ്ട് അടിക്കുകയും ചെയ്തുവെന്നായിരുന്നു പരാതി. മാതാപിതാക്കൾ നൽകിയ പരാതിയിലാണ് ജുവനൈൽ ജസ്റ്റിസ് ആക്ട് അടക്കം ചുമത്തി പോലീസ് കേസെടുത്തത്. പരാതിയില്ലെന്ന് മാതാപിതാക്കൾ അറിയിച്ചെങ്കിലും അന്വേഷണം തുടരാനാണ് പോലീസിന്റെ തീരുമാനം.</p><p>പിടിഎ നടത്തിയ അന്വേഷണത്തിൽ ക്ലാസ് മുറിയിൽ മറ്റു കുട്ടികളുടെ മുന്നിൽ വച്ച് വടികൊണ്ട് പലതവണ അടിച്ചതായി കുട്ടികൾ പറഞ്ഞു. വിവരങ്ങൾ പ്രധാന അധ്യാപനെ അറിയിക്കുന്നതിൽ വീഴ്ച വരുത്തുകയും ചെയ്തു. ഇതേത്തുടർന്നാണ് അധ്യാപകനോട് ഒരുമാസം നിർബന്ധിത അവധിയിൽ പോകാൻ സ്കൂൾ പിടിഎ നിർദ്ദേശിച്ചത്. പകരം താൽക്കാലിക അധ്യാപകനെ നിയമിച്ച ക്ലാസുകൾ മുമ്പോട്ടു കൊണ്ടുപോകും. സംഭവ സമയത്ത് ക്ലാസിൽ ഉണ്ടായിരുന്ന കുട്ടികൾക്ക് കൗൺസിലിഗും നൽകും. വിദ്യാഭ്യാസ വകുപ്പും ഇക്കാര്യത്തിൽ അന്വേഷണം ആരംഭിച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്.</p><p>ഇതിന്റെ ഭാഗമായി ജില്ല് വിദ്യാഭ്യാസ ഓഫീസിൽ നിന്നുള്ള സംഘം സ്കൂളിലെത്തി കുട്ടികളിൽ നിന്നും അധ്യാപകരിൽ നിന്നും വിവരങ്ങൾ ശേഖരിച്ചു. റിപ്പോർട്ടിന്റെ അടിസ്ഥാനത്തിൽ അധ്യാപകനെതിരെ വകുപ്പുതല നടപടിയുണ്ടാകും. അന്വേഷണവുമായി സഹകരിക്കാനാണ് പിടിഎയുടെ തീരുമാനം. മർദ്ദനത്തിൽ പ്രതിഷേധിച്ച് സ്കൂളിലേക്ക് എസ്എഫ്ഐ മാർച്ച് നടത്തി. പോലീസ് മാർച്ച് തടഞ്ഞതോടെ പ്രവർത്തകർ ഗേറ്റ് തള്ളി തുറന്ന് സ്കൂൾ കോമ്പൗണ്ടിൽ പ്രവേശിച്ച് മുദ്രാവാക്യം വിളിച്ചു. അധ്യാപകനെതിരെ കർശന നടപടി ഉണ്ടാകുമെന്ന് പ്രധാന അധ്യാപകന്റെ ഉറപ്പിനെ തുടർന്നാണ് എസ്എഫ്ഐ പ്രവർത്തകർ സമരം അവസാനിപ്പിച്ചത്.</p><p></p>

Sensex Prediction for Tuesday: Expert says range-bound trade after 372-point fall; check support, resistance levels to watch for June 30
description: Going into Tuesday's trading session, it is expected that the markets are likely to remain range-bound, with the Sensex likely to take cues from whether it can hold above the crucial 76,100 support level.
content: Sensex Prediction for Tuesday: Equity benchmark indices Sensex and Nifty ended lower on Monday, June 29, as renewed geopolitical hostilities between the US and Iran, rising oil prices and broad-based profit booking in select counters and selling pressure in IT, auto and oil stocks unnerved investors.Going into Tuesday's trading session, it is expected that the markets are likely to remain range-bound, with the Sensex likely to take cues from whether it can hold above the crucial 76,100 support level.Sensex at close on Monday, June 29 At closed on Monday, 30-share BSE Sensex declined 372.10 points, or 0.48 per cent, to settle at 76,728.37. During the day, the barometer tanked 478.72 points, or 0.62 per cent, to 76,621.75.A total of 2,629 stocks declined, while 1,712 advanced and 218 remained unchanged on the BSE.The 50-share NSE Nifty dropped 109.75 points, or 0.46 per cent, to end at 23,946.25.Sensex top gainers and losers on Monday, June 29 From the 30-share Sensex pack, Kotak Mahindra Bank declined the most by 3.24 per cent after the private lender said its MD and CEO, Ashok Vaswani, will quit upon completion of his three-year tenure and will not seek re-appointment when his current term ends on December 31, 2026. Mahindra & Mahindra, Maruti, InterGlobe Aviation, UltraTech Cement and Larsen & Toubro were also among the laggards.In contrast, Eternal, Trent, Bharat Electronics and NTPC were among the gainers.      Related News | Stock Market Closing on Monday, June 29: Sensex down 372 points, Nifty below 23,950 - Key reasons behind the fallSensex Prediction for Tuesday, June 30 According to Aakash Shah, Research Analyst at Choice Equity Broking Private Limited the key benchmark index remained under pressure throughout the session on Monday after failing to sustain above key intraday levels, reflecting cautious investor sentiment amid weak global cues and profit booking in large-cap stocks.“Technically, the Sensex slipped below the 77,000 psychological mark, indicating a temporary loss of bullish momentum and signalling a cautious near-term outlook. The index continues to trade within a broader consolidation range, with sellers dominating at higher levels while value buying is expected to emerge near key support zones,” he said.For Tuesday’s session, Shah expects immediate resistance is now placed in the 77,300-77,400 zone. “A decisive move above this range would be required to revive bullish momentum and pave the way for a recovery towards the 77,500–77,800 region,” he added.On the downside, the 76,100–76,200 zone remains a crucial support area and is expected to attract buying interest from positional investors. “A sustained breach below this support band could intensify selling pressure and trigger further consolidation towards lower levels,” Shah said. He further said the Sensex witnessed a weak and volatile trading session on 29 June 2026, closing at 76,728.00, down 372.10 points (-0.48%), as broad-based selling pressure across heavyweight counters weighed on market sentiment. “The benchmark remained under pressure throughout the session after failing to sustain above key intraday levels, reflecting cautious investor sentiment amid weak global cues and profit booking in large-cap stocks,” Shah stated.On the stock-specific front, gains were led by Eternal, Bharat Elec, Hdfc Bank, Bajaj Finance and Trent, which provided limited support to the benchmark amid defensive buying. Meanwhile, Reliance Industries, Kotak Bank, Maruti Suzuki Mahindra & Mahindra (M&M), and Larsen & Toubro (L&T) emerged as the major laggards, witnessing sustained selling pressure and dragging the index lower. Weakness in technology, Pvt Bank, and select Cons Durbl goods stocks kept overall sentiment subdued, he added.Overall, Shah said the session was characterised by broad-based profit booking and weakness in heavyweight stocks, with defensive counters offering only limited support.“Despite the decline, the benchmark continues to trade near an important technical support zone, and the next directional move is likely to depend on the index's ability to hold above 76,100–or reclaim the 77,400 resistance band with stronger buying participation,” the analyst concluded.Broader markets, sectoral indices on Monday, June 29 The BSE SmallCap Select index declined 0.65 per cent, and the MidCap Select index dipped 0.60 per cent.Sectorally, Auto tumbled 2.11 per cent, Focused IT tanked 1.53 per cent, Oil & Gas (1.40 per cent), Services (1.21 per cent), IT (1.04 per cent) and Consumer Discretionary (0.91 per cent). On the other hand, Healthcare, Utilities, Capital Goods, MidSmall Private Banks, Quality Tilt and Power were the gainers.Brent crude, the global oil benchmark, jumped 1.51 per cent to USD 73.09 per barrel.Stock markets were closed on Friday for Muharram.Foreign Institutional Investors (FIIs) bought equities worth Rs 383.76 crore on Thursday, according to exchange data.On Thursday, the Sensex settled 109.25 points, or 0.14 per cent, higher at 77,100.47. The Nifty rose by 34.35 points, or 0.14 per cent, to end at 24,056.(Disclaimer: The above article is meant for informational purposes only, and should not be considered as any investment advice. ET NOW DIGITAL suggests its readers/audience to consult their financial advisors before making any money-related decisions.)

title: F1 in Austria: Starts off exciting, then goes the opposite way
description: A heatwave, engine upgrades, plus power levels for the next two seasons.
content:
Formula 1 raced at the Red Bull Ring in Austria this past weekend while the region sweltered under a heat dome. It was a weekend of unmet expectations: After such a strong performance in Barcelona, pundits were ready to declare Ferrari's Lewis Hamilton a proper title contender. The red cars flattered to deceive at times, but the real challenge to Mercedes' ongoing dominance came from a newly resurgent Red Bull and Max Verstappen, who reminded us why so many of the packed grandstands were all wearing orange.
The original Östereichring was a spectacular thing, with steep gradients, long straights, and high-speed curves, surrounded by views of the Styrian mountains. But racetrack designers in the late 1960s paid scant attention to safety features, and the corners were mostly lined with Armco fencing. The sport stopped racing there after the 1987 Grand Prix, judging it too dangerous for the speeds F1 cars were capable of at the time. It was rebuilt in the mid-'90s, losing around a mile (1.6 km) in length and much of its original character in the process but gaining things like gravel traps and runoff areas at the corners, making the place a whole lot safer.

      The Red Bull Ring looks dramatic, but click the YouTube link in the second paragraph (<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KxUXpnGI648">or here</a>) to see in-car footage of the old track from 1987.
        Credit:
          Robert Szaniszlo/NurPhoto via Getty Images
      
F1 returned to the newly christened A1-Ring from 1997 to 2003, then left for pastures new. Red Bull's co-founder, Dietrich Mateschitz, bought it the following year—the same year he bought the Jaguar F1 team from Ford and renamed it Red Bull Racing. Mateschitz and Red Bull renovated the track again, bringing the facilities up to 21st-century F1 standards, and the sport returned in 2014. It's not the shortest lap on the calendar in terms of distance—that honor goes to Monaco—but it does have the shortest lap times: Valtteri Bottas set a time of 1 minute, 2.939 seconds in qualifying for the 2020 Austrian Grand Prix.Read full article

title: HDFC Bank appoints former Finance Secretary Rajiv Kumar as part-time Chairman
description: ​Kumar has also been appointed as an Independent Director on the board, effective June 30, pending shareholder approval. His tenure as part-time Chairman will begin once the RBI grants its approval and will continue for three years from that date.
content: India’s largest private sector lender, HDFC Bank, has appointed Rajiv Kumar as its part-time Chairman for a three-year term, subject to approval from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI). The decision was announced on Monday and comes shortly after an independent legal review found no evidence supporting concerns raised by former Chairman Atanu Chakraborty, who stepped down in March citing ethical differences with the bank.Kumar has also been appointed as an Independent Director on the board, effective June 30, pending shareholder approval. His tenure as part-time Chairman will begin once the RBI grants its approval and will continue for three years from that date.The bank’s board has approved the remuneration payable to Kumar in his role as part-time Chairman, subject to regulatory clearance. HDFC Bank will also seek shareholders’ approval for his appointment as an Independent Director and has revised the notice for its upcoming Annual General Meeting (AGM) to include resolutions related to both appointments.Rajiv Kumar brings extensive experience in public administration and financial sector reforms. A former Finance Secretary and Chief Election Commissioner of India, he played a significant role in strengthening the banking sector between 2017 and 2020. During his tenure in government, he was closely involved in the consolidation of 27 public sector banks into 12 larger entities and contributed to the implementation of more than Rs 3 lakh crore in recapitalisation measures for state-owned banks.His appointment is expected to bring considerable governance and regulatory expertise to HDFC Bank as it continues to strengthen its leadership framework and long-term growth strategy.

title: BSE announces new licensing framework for market data products effective January 2027 - Here are the details
description: BSE will assume direct control of licensing and distribution of its market data products for international clients from January 2027, ending its long-standing overseas partnership with Deutsche Börse AG.
content: BSE Ltd has announced that it will directly oversee the licensing and distribution of its market data products for international customers beginning January 1, 2027. The move will end an arrangement that has been in place for more than a decade, under which Deutsche Börse AG managed the overseas sales and marketing of BSE's market data offerings.The decision signals a significant shift in BSE's global market data strategy, enabling the exchange to engage directly with clients outside India and manage product distribution on its own. BSE said the transition process will be carried out jointly with Deutsche Börse AG to ensure that existing customers continue to receive uninterrupted services.International Clients to Be Served Directly by BSEIn a statement issued on Monday, BSE said international subscribers will start receiving its market data products directly from the exchange from January 2027. The company emphasized that there will be no disruption to services during the transition period.To facilitate a smooth handover, BSE and Deutsche Börse AG will work together throughout the migration process. The exchange noted that the objective is to maintain seamless operations and ensure continuity for all overseas customers currently using BSE's data products.No Impact on Domestic CustomersBSE clarified that the new arrangement applies only to international clients. Customers based in India will continue to access market data products directly from the exchange, as they do at present.As a result, the changes will affect only the licensing and distribution of market data outside India, while domestic operations will remain unchanged.Over a Decade-Long PartnershipThe transition marks the conclusion of a market data services agreement signed between BSE and Deutsche Börse AG in October 2013.Under the partnership, Deutsche Börse AG handled the sales, marketing and licensing of BSE's market data products across international markets, while BSE retained responsibility for servicing clients within India.Growing Importance of Market Data BusinessMarket data has emerged as a key revenue source for stock exchanges worldwide. Real-time and historical trading data is widely used by institutional investors, algorithmic trading firms, exchanges, index providers and fintech companies for research, investment decisions, trading strategies and analytical purposes.By taking direct control of international licensing, BSE is positioning itself to strengthen relationships with global customers and expand its presence in the growing market data business.

title: ఆసుపత్రికి పవన్ కళ్యాణ్..కారణం ఏంటి అంటే !!
description: Pawan Hospitalized : ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ ఉప ముఖ్యమంత్రి, జనసేన అధినేత పవన్ కళ్యాణ్ వైద్య పరీక్షల నిమిత్తం ముంబైలోని ప్రముఖ కోకిలాబెన్ ధీరూభాయ్ అంబానీ ఆసుపత్రికి వెళ్లారు....
content:
Pawan Hospitalized : ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ ఉప ముఖ్యమంత్రి, జనసేన అధినేత పవన్ కళ్యాణ్ వైద్య పరీక్షల నిమిత్తం ముంబైలోని ప్రముఖ కోకిలాబెన్ ధీరూభాయ్ అంబానీ ఆసుపత్రికి వెళ్లారు. గత కొంతకాలంగా ఆయన రెండు భుజాలకు సంబంధించిన తీవ్రమైన నొప్పితో బాధపడుతున్నట్లు జనసేన పార్టీ వర్గాలు వెల్లడించాయి. వైద్య పరిభాషలో దీనిని ‘రొటేటర్ కఫ్’ (Rotator Cuff) గాయంగా పేర్కొంటారు. పవన్ కళ్యాణ్ రెండు భుజాల కండరాలు పూర్తిగా చిట్లిపోవడం వల్ల ఆయన తీవ్ర అసౌకర్యానికి గురవుతున్నారని, ఈ పాత గాయానికి సంబంధించిన అధునాతన వైద్య పరీక్షలు మరియు తదుపరి చికిత్స కోసమే ఆయన ముంబై ఆసుపత్రిని ఆశ్రయించారని సమాచారం. నిరంతర రాజకీయ పర్యటనలు, ఎన్నికల ప్రచారం మరియు సినిమాల్లోని భారీ యాక్షన్ సీక్వెన్సుల వల్ల ఈ సమస్య మరింత ఎక్కువైనట్లు తెలుస్తోంది.



Read Also : గిరిజన హక్కుల కోసమే పవన్ ఆ శాఖ తీసుకున్నారు.. నాగబాబు











తోడుగా వెళ్లిన సతీమణి అన్నా కొణిదెల.. అభిమానుల్లో ఆందోళన



ఉప ముఖ్యమంత్రి పవన్ కళ్యాణ్ ముంబై పర్యటనలో ఆయన సతీమణి అన్నా కొణిదెల కూడా వెంట ఉన్నారు. ఆసుపత్రిలో పవన్‌కు అవసరమైన అన్ని రకాల స్కానింగ్‌లు మరియు వైద్య పరీక్షలు నిర్వహించిన అనంతరం, వైద్యుల బృందం సూచనల మేరకు తదుపరి చికిత్స లేదా మైనర్ సర్జరీ అవసరమా అనే దానిపై స్పష్టత రానుంది. పవన్ కళ్యాణ్ ఆసుపత్రికి వెళ్లారనే వార్త బయటకు రావడంతో అటు జనసేన శ్రేణుల్లో, ఇటు మెగా అభిమానుల్లో ఒక్కసారిగా ఆందోళన వ్యక్తమైంది. అయితే ఇది కేవలం పాత గాయానికి సంబంధించిన సాధారణ పరీక్షల కోసమేనని, అభిమానులు కంగారు పడాల్సిన అవసరం లేదని పార్టీ వర్గాలు ధీమా వ్యక్తం చేశాయి. ఆయన త్వరగా కోలుకోవాలని సామాజిక మాధ్యమాల్లో పెద్ద ఎత్తున పోస్టులు వస్తున్నాయి.

title: WhatsApp Now Lets You Reserve Your Username Before the Much-Anticipated Feature Goes Live
description: WhatsApp adds an optional username key for privacy
content: WhatsApp has begun rolling out username reservations ahead of the wider launch of usernames later this year. The feature will let users connect without sharing their phone numbers and includes privacy measures such as an optional username key for first-time contacts. WhatsApp says there will be no public username directory or suggestions. The company has also introduced a username generator and will let creators, businesses, and organisations claim their existing Instagram or Facebook usernames for a consistent identity across Meta platforms.
